Event: Royal Challenge - Season 39
Event Date: 01/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI199
King's Amethyst Ring

Once in a while deals 550000 pure damage to 3 random enemy units for 3 sec. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. When the effect runs out, the target has deep freeze applied to them for 3 sec. The frozen units can't move or attack, and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode and take 485000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearby enemies. On hit, the icicles deal 325000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 4 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 40% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
